raw_narrative: LAS VEGAS, NV, (WSC ROC), (LAS), (NKS2066), N901NK, A20N. NKS2066 (BNA-LAS) IFR landed on RWY26L and taxied to the gate. A routine night inspection revealed the aircraft experienced a tail strike while landing, with evidence of paint on the runway and damage on the tail section of the aircraft. No FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: Unknown, Injuries: None, Damage: Unknown. 8/30/2025 0016Z.

raw_narrative: SAN FRANCISCO (SFO), UAL1871, B738. UAL1871 was pushed onto the ramp from Gate D16. The pilot reported to ground control that they may have pushed into another aircraft. Airfield ops and the fire department were called to the scene and confirmed that they had pushed back into an aircraft in Gate E5, UAL769, which was proposed to depart but had not yet pushed from the gate. No injuries were reported; however, the aircraft were pulled back into the gate, and both aircraft deboarded. It was reported to the tower from airfield ops that UAL1871 had a bent horizontal stabilizer and that UAL769 had damaged the exhaust column. FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: Unknown, Injuries: None, Damage: Substantial. 9/2/2025 0412Z.

raw_narrative: DENVER, CO (DEN), (Air Canada), ACA1038, BCS3. ACA1038 (DEN-CYYZ) IFR declared an emergency for a suspected electrical fire in the galley and returned to DEN. raw_narrative: (FAI), N4079H, PA31. N4079H (VFR) reported a nose gear malfunction to FAI WR. The aircraft was given entry to FAI Tower and performed a “flyby” for the tower and company’s inspection of the nose gear. It was observed to be malfunctioning. N4079H orbited the field to prepare for a collapsed gear landing. N4079H landed on RWY02L, and the nose gear collapsed. FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: Unknown, Injuries: None, Damage: Minor. 2/11/2026 1932Z.

raw_narrative: (SBA), SKW3995, E75L. SKW3995 (SLC-SBA) IFR reported a bird strike on final for RWY25. The aircraft landed without incident. raw_narrative: (ZDV), N98FK/EPIC. N98FK was cleared for the RNAV Approach to the Steamboat Springs (SBS) Airport, CO, and crashed in the vicinity of SBS. N98FK was transferred to CTAF; however, they did not cancel IFR. Local Law enforcement received a report of a possible crash in mountainous terrain. The aircraft was subject to an ALNOT issued by ZDV. FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: 4, Injuries: 4- Fatal, Damage: Substantial. 2/13/2026 0720Z.

raw_narrative: (FMN), N84071, C172. N84071 was landing on RWY07 and veered off the runway to the right shoulder, then returned to the runway surface. The aircraft taxied to parking on its own power. raw_narrative: (EUG), N4346D, P28A. N4346D was conducting an engine out training procedure when the aircraft struck a power line. The aircraft continued to EUG and made a safe emergency landing. FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: 2, Injuries: None, Damage: Minor. Update: 2/2/2026 2/11/2026 2250Z. MISCELLANEOUS: None. 2/13/2026 2/13/2026

raw_narrative: (OGG), N738FA, C172. N738FA was holding short of RWY05 for VFR pattern work when the pilot reported having engine issues. Soon after, the pilot had to put out an engine fire and required assistance. The Airport Fire Crew arrived on the scene and put out the fire. The aircraft was towed safely back to the East Ramp. FAA Form 8020-9 was received. POB: 1, Injuries: None, Damage: Minor. Late Report: 2/12/2026 0022Z. UPDATE: None. MISCELLANEOUS: None. 2/19/2026
